title: The Colosseum Pressure Builds
description: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Kinemon, Zoro, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #16 as the Colosseum battle intensifies as Bartolomeo’s strange power and cruel reputation become impossible to ignore.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Much like how we place our hopes

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I suspect there also lies a path to understanding each other through the exchange of fists!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What are you doing? He's just one weaponless, gangly man!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: WEAPONLESS OR NOT, GANGLY OR NOT ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: It's no fun if you're so far away.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No way!! I'm not getting near him ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So just aim for his legs!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Long-leg Tribe Jao-kun do fighter BLUE GILLY

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Those movements!! There's no telling where the kicks will come flying from....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: "That guy ... he's real strong, but do you know who he is...?

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: I've been a gladiator here for a long time, but ... I've never seen him before !!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Gladiators at this colosseum undergo training with sword and shield....!!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Like a Samural from Wanokuni or something....!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: But he's just got a sword

summary: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
